name: Sangria Blanca II (White Sangria Ii)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the wine, apple juice, orange liqueur, sugar, orange slices, lemon slices, lime slices, and raspberries in a large pitcher.
2. Press the fruit against the sides and bottom of the pitcher using a wooden spoon.
3. Add ice cubes to the pitcher and stir gently until chilled.
